library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description:
Verso: State document, two lines preserved and one partial line above. Due to water damage or perhaps long-term pressure and ink transfer, the document bears a mirror image of itself, in some cases obscuring the original text. Probably related to the capitation tax if the "jåliya" reading is correct. 

Join: Matthew Dudley. (Information from MCD/YU/ASE)
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
